CONTENT.Career: Bozdoğan made his debut for Schalke 04 in the Bundesliga on 14 June 2020, starting in the home match against Bayer Leverkusen.On 27 August 2021, he agreed to join Süper Lig club Beşiktaş on a season-long loan with an option to make the move permanent.On 26 July 2022, he joined Eredivisie club Utrecht, again on a season-long loan with an option to make the move permanent. On 30 May 2023, he completed the permanent move.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Germany, Bozdoğan is of Turkish descent.
CONTENT.External links: Can Bozdoğan at DFB (also available in German)Can Bozdoğan – UEFA competition record (archive)Can Bozdoğan at kicker (in German)Can Bozdoğan at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Can Bozdoğan (born 5 April 2001) is a German professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Eredivisie club Utrecht.
